reviews.review_description:
First a thanks to the devs

 Iv logged several hrs now. I will update after a couple more. This game has alot of content, well designed controls, and decent graphics. Speaking off, you can actually adjust the graphics to your liking. The mobs have variety and are well designed. Iv screamed because of this game.

Everything you want in a VR shooter for the go. Good Graphics, controls have a lot of options to make it your own the only issue is the gun gets off sync, quick switch of the weapons is a bit wonky and can get you killed, and sometimes it shoots instead of reloading. I still give it 5 stars because it has a great replayability.

reviews.review_title: Easy the best game I have on go.
reviews.review_description: I love the mechanics, it’s such a good game. The stabbing is a nice touch because instead of using the trigger, you just swing. The guns are easy to use, and it’s kinda hard to switch weapons at first but you get the hang of it.i recommend this game to doom and zombie fans. It would also be cool if you could do multiplayer!

reviews.review_title: Loved it,one of the best zombie shooters
reviews.review_description:
First of all, I love this Doom-esk game it has great 3d graphics and satisfying zombie shooting. Another thing i love is that you manually stab the zombies with the knife, in this game you can Walk around unlike other zombie shooters on the go.

What this game needs:

A thing that this game really needs is a co - op  zombie survival mode so you can team up with other people and or friends against the zombies

developer_response.body: reallityisviritual, thank you for your comments! Unfortunately there won't be any multiplayer, maybe on the sequel :-)

reviews.review_title: One of the best shooters on the go but..
reviews.review_description: The game freezes all the time, I had just downloaded the game 3 days ago and I've only stuck in an hour of gameplay due to the constant freezing and crashing, the game is lots of fun but when I'm in the middle of a wave, it freezes then crashes. And not just during was, that was just an example

developer_response.body: Hello TheL.Surface, please email at stormingtech.info@gmail.com or better join the discord channel https://discord.gg/YxbNfrH

reviews.review_description: It freezes when I stab the zombie that shoots acid please fix this problem but other than that its great love it great job

developer_response.body: tom.riste.7 , can you please confirm you are running the latest version? Thank you!

reviews.review_description:
I love this game. I play both PC and mobile phone. But I have a graphics problem, the color is gray, distorted, not black on Oculus go. Not sure if it's a problem on my device or everyone has a problem as well and I want to fix this topic.
And if there is a sequel, I'm happy to buy it and want the story mode.

developer_response.body:
After latest Oculus Software Updates, it resulted in an Greyish-Dark enviroment. Clearly not what it was on launch. Am still trying to fix that, but also the Freeze Crash. Be patient soon it will be resolved for 1.10 Update. Stay tuned!

EDIT : update 1.10 is available

reviews.review_description:
Best Shooter on the Go in my opinion. Even with it freezing once in a while and the Greyish overlay (after the most recent Oculus Update) over objects it is till the closest thing to full immersion in the go in terms of a FPS 
.The controls are great though switching weapons could be a bit more responsive. Well worth your money especially when the crashing and graphics gets fixed(Please fix!!)

developer_response.body: Hello BruceKent, you may want to update to latest version as "Color Issue" and Freezing are already fixed. Thank you!

reviews.review_title: Its a good game but fix this bug
reviews.review_description: I just got this game yesterday and the guy that spit out stuff keep on freezing the game and if u try stab it and it spits its freeze the game fix this bug and ill rate it 5 stars
One of my favorite games right now. The progression in the game is good. Starts easy gets real tough. It's a must have game especially for the price. Hope to see more from the creator's!

developer_response.body: Freeze Bug was fixed on latest version. Thank you for the feedback!
